description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/requirements.txt to pin flask to an exact version (2.3.3) and numpy to an exact version (1.26.4), replacing the range and the bare name. check_pins.py then finds every line exactly pinned and exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_pins.py: 2 unpinned dependencies found — 'flask>=2.3.0' (a range, not an exact pin) and 'numpy' (a bare name with no version at all). Pinning both to exact versions. Not touching the checker.

actions.content:
# Runtime dependencies for the billing service
requests==2.31.0
flask==2.3.3
pydantic==2.5.0
numpy==1.26.4

interactions.notes: The fix — check_pins.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
